options.name: --serviceId
options.description: The id of the omnia service for which to download the language file

options.name: --lang
options.description: Language tag to download, on format e.g. da-dk

options.name: --match
options.description: Get the localization that would be used if a service with version --match 'someversion', is deployed.

options.name: --diff
options.description: Enable diff between localization versions

commands.name: patch
commands.description: Patch an existing version of service localization json file

options.name: --src
options.description: Language patch json file, on format serviceid_localized.loc.languagetag.json

options.name: --v
options.description: From which version of the omnia service this language should take effect

commands.name: upload
commands.description: Upload new version of service localization json file

options.name: --src
options.description: Language json file, on format serviceid_localized.loc.languagetag.json

options.name: --v
options.description: From which version of the omnia service this language should take effect

options.name: --bypass
options.description: Always override if any

options.name: --path
options.description: Path to save the file

options.name: --filename
options.description: Name of the file

options.name: --path
options.description: Path to save the file

options.name: --user
options.description: UPN

options.name: --clientId
options.description: Client Id

options.name: --clientSecret
options.description: Secret

options.name: --extension-group-id
options.description: update-config Extension Group ID to be deployed

options.name: --deployment-group-id
options.description: update-config Deployment Group ID that LTS customer will be added to.

options.name: --sku-vm-size
options.description: update-config SKU VM Size for the LTS customer. The default will be now Standard_B12ms for consistency with current VMs.

options.name: --notification-email
options.description: update-configZendesk Notification email.

options.name: --omnia-walkthrough-url
options.description: The url that will be redirected to for users onboarding. This only accepts absolute URL

options.name: --feature-group-id
options.description: The feature group ID that will ensure permissions of the features in app registration. If possible, will activate those features

options.description: The probe operation. Now accepted add or remove

options.description: Probe type: readiness or liveness

options.description: K8s config for probing. Intervals between each probe

options.description: The threshold if exceed k8s will take action
